log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Deep Gnome — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Deep Gnome — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Deep Gnome — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Deep Gnome — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Deep Gnome — Winged Striker HP: 52/67
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Deep Gnome — Winged Striker HP: 37/67
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Deep Gnome — Winged Striker HP: 19/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Deep Gnome — Winged Striker --- HP: 19/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Deep Gnome — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Deep Gnome — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 damage. Deep Gnome — Winged Striker HP: 10/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Deep Gnome — Winged Striker HP: -2/67

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Deep Gnome — Winged Striker --- HP: 14/67 | AC: 14

→ Deep Gnome — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
